rationale: Annotated each `assert forall` with explicit triggers matching the ensures' triggers (`postX.get_proc/get_container/get_endpoint`, `pre_self_.get_thread`), so z3 instantiates both runs' ensures-quantifiers at the same witness. After deriving per-key `get_X(k) == get_X(k)` equalities, we lift them to Map extensional equality on each `*_perms@` field via a per-key `m[k] == m[k]` assert-forall + `=~=`.
